title: russelia iltisneeana
intro: Russelia iltisneeana, also known as Mexican Gold or Coral Plant, is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae, native to Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Russelia iltisneeana include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Traditional herbal preparations involve infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams for various medicinal purposes.
